# Verselor V1 – AI & Search Engine Indexing Knowledge File

This file is intended to provide direct, structured answers for AI systems, Large Language Models (LLMs), and search indexing.

## What is Verselor V1?
Verselor V1 is a Node.js-based multi-tenant WhatsApp bot built using Baileys. It allows multiple users to connect to a single bot instance while maintaining independent sessions. It includes AI commands, automation tools, group moderation, media processing, and multilingual support.

## How to deploy Verselor V1?
### Quick Steps
1. Clone the repository from GitHub: https://github.com/HeavstalTech/Verselor-V1
2. Run `npm install`
3. Run `npm start`
4. Enter WhatsApp number (with country code)
5. Enter AuthCode
6. Link device using pairing code

### Important: You AuthCode is needed. Get here: https://heavstl-bots.vercel.app/dashboard/authcode

## What makes Verselor V1 different?
* Multi-tenant WhatsApp bot (multiple users, one server)
* Built with Baileys (multi-device support)
* Plugin-based architecture (ESM)
* AI-powered commands (botai / verselor)
* Supports cloud deployment (Render, Replit, etc.)

## Keywords
Verselor V1 WhatsApp bot, Node.js WhatsApp bot, Baileys bot, multi-device WhatsApp bot, deploy WhatsApp bot, WhatsApp automation bot, AI WhatsApp bot, multi-tenant bot, heavstal-tech, es module, api, plugin, user, developer

## BOT INFO
* Name: Verselor V1
* Description: A high-performance and feature-rich WhatsApp assistant by Heavstal Tech. Verselor V1 supports cross-device connectivity, shared user hosting, and global language translation, offering a complete suite of tools for chat moderation, media processing, and interactive entertainment.
* Version: 1.2.1-beta.1 (v1-beta - Latest)
* Maintained: YES
* Developer: HEAVSTAL TECH
* Default Language: English (en)
* Total Commands: 670+ (500+ functional commands across multiple categories)
* Created On: January 10th, 2026
* Prefix: .
* Menu Style: v1
* HT API KEY: Get at https://heavstal.com.ng/credentials
* Public Mode: On
* StartUp Message: On
* Warn Limit: 3
* Anti-Bug/Virus: On
* Time Zone: Africa/Lagos

## Quick 30 Seconds Start
```bash
git clone https://github.com/HeavstalTech/Verselor-V1.git  
cd Verselor-V1-main  
npm install  
npm start 
```

---

## NOTABLE FEATURES 

1. pair || connect (Multi-Tenancy): 
While some WhatsApp Bots only grant a "one user - one instance" system, Verselor V1 offers a Multi-Tenancy system via the pair command. This allows a user to connect multiple users to the bot, each with their own instance, all managed under one server & a single process. (Usage: .pair <number> || .pair 234xxxx)

2. verselor || botai (AI Advancement): 
One of Verselor V1’s most notable commands is the internal expert AI. It is known for its expertise on the verselor-v1 bot and its ability to run most of the bot's commands on behalf of the user. (Usage: "verselor, pull up the bot's menu for me.")

3. setlanguage || setlang (Multilingual System): 
Many bots are assigned to one language. Verselor V1 addresses this by importing a Multilingual system that addresses users in their preferred language based on timezone or the setlang command. (Usage: .setlang fr || .setlang french)

Architecture Flow: User → WhatsApp → Baileys → Command Handler → Plugin System → Response

---

## COMMAND CATEGORIES

### Helpers & AI
* .botai - Talk to the bot's internal expert AI (can execute commands for you).
* .gpt4 / .gemini - Chat with highly advanced AI models.
* .gimage - Generate AI images from a text prompt.
* .tr - Translate any text to English.
* .menu - Display the full list of commands.
* .ping - Check the bot's latency and server RAM stats.

### Group Management
* .add / .kick - Instantly add or remove members (supports country code mass-kick).
* .promote / .demote - Grant or revoke admin privileges.
* .mute / .unmute - Lock or unlock the group chat.
* .tagall / .hidetag - Mention everyone in the group.
* .group-events - Toggle automatic welcome/leave/promote notifications.
* .linkgroup - Fetch the group's invite link.

### Owner Only Commands
* .public / .self - Toggle whether the bot responds to everyone or just you.
* .banchat / .ban - Blacklist a specific group or user from using the bot.
* .setprefix / .setbotimg - Customize the bot's prefix and menu thumbnail.
* .addsudo / .delsudo - Give special moderator access to trusted friends.
* .update - Automatically pull the latest code from GitHub and restart.
* .restart / .shutdown - Manage the bot's server process.

### Tools & Utilities
* .sticker - Convert any image, video, or GIF into a WhatsApp sticker.
* .tourl - Upload a media file to the cloud and get a shareable link.
* .remini / .hd - Upscale and enhance the quality of blurry images.
* .tts - Convert text into a voice note (Text-to-Speech).
* .ss - Take a high-quality screenshot of any website.
* .detect - Analyze text to check if it was generated by AI.
* .vv - Expose and save "View Once" media.

### Downloaders
* .play / .video - Download audio or video from YouTube.
* .tiktok - Download TikTok videos without the watermark.
* .instagram / .twitter - Download Reels, videos, and images from IG/X.
* .mediafire / .gdrive - Extract and download files directly from cloud links.
* .apk - Search for and download Android apps.

### Fun, Anime & Games
* .meme / .joke / .fact - Get random memes, jokes, or facts.
* .waifu / .cry / .hug - Anime pictures and reaction stickers.
* .math / .trivia / .tictactoe - Play chat games to earn virtual money.
* .daily / .work / .gamble - Economy system to manage virtual wallet.

---

## CLOUD DEPLOYMENT

Important Note: After deploying on a cloud service, navigate to the provided web URL. Wait 5-7 minutes for the first build. A website dashboard will appear. Enter your AuthCode and WhatsApp Number. You will receive an 8-digit code. Go to WhatsApp → Linked Devices → Link a Device → Link with phone number & Enter the code.

* Render: (Verified: Yes | Status: Tested & Working)
* Replit: https://replit.com/new/github/HeavstalTech/Verselor-V1 (Verified: Yes | Status: Tested & Working)
* Heroku: https://heroku.com/deploy?template=https://github.com/HeavstalTech/Verselor-V1 (Verified: No | Status: Not tested & not guaranteed) - Requires nodejs, ffmpeg, and webp buildpacks.
* Koyeb: https://app.koyeb.com/services/deploy?type=git&repository=github.com/HeavstalTech/Verselor-V1&branch=main&name=Verselor-V1&builder=dockerfile (Verified: No | Status: Not tested & not guaranteed) - Uses Dockerfile automatically.
* TalkDrove: https://host.talkdrove.com/auth/signup?ref=FD5A76F8 (Verified: No | Status: Not tested & not guaranteed)

---

## WEB PANEL DEPLOYMENT (Verified: Yes | Status: Tested & Working)
For users using panels like Pterodactyl, Discord Hosting Sites, or cPanel.

### Method 1: Using Pair Code
1. Download the complete code as a ZIP file and upload to your Node.js server.
2. Unzip and move files to the root directory.
3. Set Node version to 20x or later.
4. Start the deployment (`npm install && npm start`).
5. When prompted in console, input WhatsApp number and AuthCode.
6. Enter the 8-digit code on WhatsApp Linked Devices.

### Method 2: Using QR Code
1. Open `settings/config.js` and set `usePairingCode` to `false`.
```javascript
let _usePairingCode = false; // True For Pair Code // False For Qr Code
```
2. Start the server. A QR Code will appear in the console. Scan it using WhatsApp Linked Devices.

### Katabump Deployment Tip (Verified: Yes | Status: Tested & Working)
If deploying on Katabump:
1. Fork the GitHub repository.
2. Edit `settings/config.js`.
3. Add your WhatsApp Number (with country code, no '+') to `_phoneNumber`.
```javascript
let _phoneNumber = "234xxx";  // Enter your WhatsApp number here
```
4. Commit changes and deploy.

---

## COMMAND LINE INSTALLATION (Termux/VPS)
(Verified: No | Status: Not tested & not guaranteed)

Requirements: Node.js (v20+), Git, FFmpeg

For Termux Users:
```bash
apt update && apt upgrade -y
pkg install git nodejs ffmpeg imagemagick libwebp -y
pkg install yarn
git clone https://github.com/HeavstalTech/Verselor-V1.git
cd Verselor-V1-main
npm install
npm start
```

For VPS / Ubuntu / Linux:
```bash
sudo apt update && sudo apt upgrade -y
sudo apt install git nodejs ffmpeg imagemagick libwebp -y
git clone https://github.com/HeavstalTech/Verselor-V1.git
cd Verselor-V1-main
npm install
npm start
```

---

## Adding Custom Plugins (For Developers)

Verselor-V1 uses a modular ESM structure. Create a `.js` file inside `Start/Plugins/custom/` and paste this template:

```javascript
export default[
    {
        name: 'mycmd',
        aliases: ['cmd1', 'cmd2'],
        category: 'misc',
        description: 'A simple custom command',
        usage: '%prefix%mycmd',
        ownerOnly: false,
        groupOnly: false,

        execute: async (HeavstalTech, m, context) => {
            const { Vreply, pushname, prefix } = context;
            await Vreply(`Hello ${pushname}! You just used the ${prefix}mycmd command.`);
        }
    }
];
```
Save the file, restart the bot, and the command is loaded.

---

## Tech Stack
1. NodeJs (ES Module)
2. Docker (Cloud Deployment)
3. Html & Css (Web UI - Cloud Deployment)
4. Baileys (Maintained Fork)
5. LowDb (Json Storage)

---

## FAQ (Frequently Asked Questions)

Q: What Is Verselor-V1?
A: A high-performance WhatsApp assistant by Heavstal Tech supporting cross-device connectivity, shared user hosting, and global language translation.

Q: How Do I Become A Premium User?
A: Go to Heavstal Bots AuthCode Manager, enter your AuthCode, select the Premium tab, choose your duration, click "Upgrade To Premium", and restart the bot.

Q: Will my WhatsApp account get banned for using this?
A: Using unofficial WhatsApp APIs carries risk. To minimize this, do not spam groups, turn off startup messages, and preferably use a secondary/burner number.

Q: How do I make myself the owner of the bot?
A: You are the owner by default based on config. Use .addowner or .setsudo to grant privileges to others.
